The '''Sronk''' were a cultural group who spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] using hand-based metaphors, such as "seeing things full-left-handed" for "seeing things first-hand" and "full slamming brunt of the closed right hand" to describe a large-scale military offensive.<ref name="Specter" />

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], a Sronk [[Unidentified Sronk Senator|Senator's]] [[Unidentified Sronk Senator's homeworld|homeworld's]] defenses were [[Battle of unidentified world|beaten]] by seven [[Dreadnought-class heavy cruiser|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] which [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] had retrieved from the [[Katana fleet]]. When Thrawn appeared to return in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the Sronk [[Senator/Legends|senator]], who had personally witnessed his homeworld's defeat, advised caution to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Specter" />
